mutations.title: Fractured Bod
mutations.description: When you take damage from an attack, gain a random buff.
mutations.effects:
When this unit takes damage from an ability, do the following for this unit:
- Do a random one of the following:
- Apply +1 Charge
- Apply +1 Thorns
- When this unit takes damage, emit a Sparkle
- Apply +1 Diminishing Health Regen
- Apply +1 Random Stat Up (can split across different stats)
- Apply +1 Shield

mutations.title: Kitten Bod
mutations.description: Spawn a Charmed Kitten familiar when you get downed.
mutations.effects: When this unit is downed, spawn "Charmed Kitten Kitten Runs away when damaged." at their location (enemy corpses will be exploded immediately, while player corpses will be pushed to a nearby tile)

mutations.title: Backpack
mutations.description: Gain an extra consumable item at the end of each battle.

On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Add the Fire element to basic attacks
This unit's basic attacks do the following for the target:
- Apply +1 Burn

mutations.title: Horn Tail
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Thorns

mutations.title: Tail Feather
mutations.description: Your basic attack is wind element.
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Add the Wind element to basic attacks
This unit's basic attacks do the following for the target:
- Apply +1 Knockback
- Spawn a "fx_windSpell" particle at the target tile

mutations.title: Flame Tail
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Add the Fire element to basic attacks
This unit's basic attacks do the following for the target:
- Apply +1 Burn

mutations.title: Light Bulb
mutations.description: While at full mana, you have +2 Damage.
mutations.effects:
While this unit is at full mana, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +2 Damage Up

mutations.title: Tongue Tail
mutations.description: Gain +1 Charge when you take damage.
mutations.effects:
When this unit takes damage, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Charge

mutations.title: Kitten Tail
mutations.description: Spawn a Charmed Kitten familiar when you get downed.
mutations.effects: When this unit is downed, spawn "Charmed Kitten Kitten Runs away when damaged." at their location (enemy corpses will be exploded immediately, while player corpses will be pushed to a nearby tile)

mutations.title: Heavy Tail
mutations.description:
+1 Constitution
Start each battle with Immobile 1.
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Immobile

mutations.title: Forked Tail
mutations.description:
-2 Luck
Hunter abilities are also offered when you level up.
mutations.effects: This unit can also be offered Hunter class abilities on levelup

mutations.title: Beaver Tail*
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Brace

mutations.title: Spiked Tail*
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Thorns

mutations.title: Mermaid Tail*
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- This unit ignores the movement penalty for water tiles

mutations.title: Devil Tail*
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Bleed Thorns

mutations.title: Sonichu Tail*
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Replace basic move with "Shadowstep" (non-mutation, will override mutations and other non-mutations)

mutations.title: Slender Tail*
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Bonus Attack

mutations.title: Human Head Tail
mutations.effects: Apply +2 Backflip

mutations.title: Stitches
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Health Regen

mutations.title: Fish Scales
mutations.description: +1 Health and Mana Regeneration while wet.
mutations.effects:
While this unit is "affected" by Water element effects (e.g. Wet or standing in "water" tiles), do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Health Regen
- Apply +1 mana regen

mutations.title: Patches
mutations.description: Start each battle with a random stat up.
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Random Stat Up

mutations.title: Confusing Hide
mutations.description: Units that contact or attack you have a 10% chance to become Confused.
mutations.effects:
When this unit receives contact or is attacked, do the following for the target:
- 10% chance to apply +1 Confusion

mutations.title: Eyeballs
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +5% Dodge Chance

mutations.title: Tatted Up
mutations.description: Your basic attack has a 5% chance to inflict Fear. You have a 5% chance to inflict Fear on units who contact or attack you.
mutations.effects:
When this unit receives contact or is attacked, do the following for the target:
- 5% chance to apply +1 Fear
This unit's basic attacks do the following for the target:
- 5% chance to apply +1 Fear

mutations.title: Cash Hide
mutations.description: Gain double the effects of pickups you collect.
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- When this unit collects a pickup, its value is doubled

mutations.title: Bleeding
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +1 Bleed

mutations.title: Blue Spots
mutations.description:
-2 Charisma
Mage abilities are also offered when you level up.
mutations.effects: This unit can also be offered Mage class abilities on levelup

mutations.title: Red Dots
mutations.description:
-2 Charisma
Fighter abilities are also offered when you level up.
mutations.effects: This unit can also be offered Fighter class abilities on levelup

mutations.title: Jaundice
mutations.description:
-2 Charisma
Thief abilities are also offered when you level up.
mutations.effects: This unit can also be offered Thief class abilities on levelup

mutations.title: Vitiligo
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +10% Dodge Chance

mutations.title: Skunk Hide
mutations.description: Units who contact you get Poison 2.
mutations.effects:
On battle start, or when the effect is created, do the following for this unit:
- Apply +2 Poisonous
